title: Prove deterministic reconciliation policy and ambiguity guards
preconditions: A versioned ReconciliationPolicyV1 fixture set covers exact matches, shifted dates, competing candidates, conflicting evidence, and no-candidate cases.
steps: Evaluate every fixture through candidate projection and apply-policy validation; permute candidate order and repeat logical identities.
expected: Only empirically allowed unique strong matches can be automatic; guard candidates block statement-only creation; ambiguity never mutates a transaction; bases and policy versions are stable and order independent.
